name: Funny Dark Rabbit
desc: After this card is Normal or Special Summoned, you can Normal Summon 1 monster that mentions "Toon World" during your Main Phase this turn, in addition to your Normal Summon/Set (you can only gain this effect once per turn). This card is treated as a Toon monster while "Toon World" is on the field. Once per turn: You can add to your hand or place face-up on your field, 1 "Toon" Field or Continuous Spell from your Deck.
